No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course's objective to express '身心理狀態與感受' (physical and psychological states and feelings) offers a minimal, inferred link to promoting mental well-being (Target 3.4).
evidence: 表達某人身心理狀態與感受

Quality Education.reason: As a university-level 'professional course', it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops '語言交際能力' (language communication skills) relevant for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 「中級俄語語法」屬於語言交際能力培養之專業課程
修完本學期課程者將具備俄語初級至基礎級（A1-A2）語法程度
